subject: docs: record DaisyUI v5 -bordered trap in AI_MISTAKES + SESSION_NOTES
body:
Capture the v4-to-v5 DaisyUI form-modifier rename
(input-bordered / select-bordered / textarea-bordered are all
REMOVED in v5 — bordered is the default; use `*-ghost` to unborder)
in AI_MISTAKES.md so future sessions don't repeat the trap. Include
a grep recipe for verifying which DaisyUI component classes actually
exist in the built CSS.

Also amend SESSION_NOTES Phase 8 bullet to reflect the fix commit
`de9bd4f` and explain the v5 API shift, so the session notes stay
accurate for the next session start.

Tags: documentation, daisyui, migration, postmortem
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-component-migration
Semver: patch
